description: comment explaining what the code does rather than why it does it
input:
class Account < ApplicationRecord
  def purge!
    # Set state to purged
    update!(state: :purged)
    # Set the purged_at timestamp
    update!(purged_at: Time.current)
    # Loop over attachments and delete each one
    attachments.each(&:purge)
    # Send confirmation email
    AccountMailer.purge_confirmation(self).deliver_later
  end
end
